message:
feat(fp-index): add MultiIndex.reorder_levels() (frankenpandas-sa6)

Add reorder_levels(order) method to MultiIndex that rearranges levels
according to a specified index order. Matches pd.MultiIndex.reorder_levels().

Validates: order length matches nlevels, all indices in range, no
duplicate indices. 5 new tests covering reordering with name
preservation, identity reorder, wrong length, duplicate index, and
out-of-bounds errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
